EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface INetworkForwardStar

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that query information about adjacent elements in the network dataset.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("FDE593A2-8E96-40C8-8AB2-6DA6D60AF9B9")]
public interface INetworkForwardStar

Properties

BacktrackPolicy

Policy on when to return the from-edge in the NetworkForwardStarAdjacencies object.

esriNetworkForwardStarBacktrack BacktrackPolicy { get; set; }

Property Value

esriNetworkForwardStarBacktrack

Examples

Sample Snippet

HierarchyAttribute

Network attribute containing the hierarchy values for each network element.

INetworkAttribute HierarchyAttribute { get; set; }

Property Value

INetworkAttribute

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsFiltered[INetworkElement]

Indicates if the given network element is filtered out from the adjacencies object.

bool IsFiltered[INetworkElement Element] { get; }

Parameters

Element INetworkElement

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsForwardTraversal

Indicates if the NetworkForwardStar object is used to model forward traversal through the network dataset.

bool IsForwardTraversal { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsRestricted[INetworkElement]

Indicates if the given network element is restricted from traversal in the NetworkForwardStar object.

bool IsRestricted[INetworkElement Element] { get; }

Parameters

Element INetworkElement

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxTraversableHierarchyValue

Maximum hierarchy attribute value for elements permitted to be returned in the adjacency queries.

int MaxTraversableHierarchyValue { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

NetworkDataset

Network dataset on which the NetworkForwardStar object is querying.

INetworkDataset NetworkDataset { get; }

Property Value

INetworkDataset

Examples

Sample Snippet

RestrictionAttribute[int]

Restriction network attribute by index in the NetworkForwardStar object.

INetworkAttribute RestrictionAttribute[int Index] { get; }

Parameters

Index int

Property Value

INetworkAttribute

Sample Snippet

RestrictionAttributeCount

Number of restriction network attributes currently applied to the NetworkForwardStar object.

int RestrictionAttributeCount { get; }

Property Value

int
